title: Indifferent
excerpt: An indifferent attitude means one creature currently has no strong goodwill or hostility toward another and is not especially motivated to help or hinder it.
markdown:
# Indifferent

An indifferent attitude describes a creature that currently has no strong favorable or hostile investment in another creature's outcome. It is neither eager to help nor especially driven to interfere.

## Rules Use

Indifferent is the middle social stance between friendly and hostile. Negotiation or influence begins from a position that is open to movement, but not already committed toward cooperation.

## Relationship State

Indifference can shift in either direction as events unfold. Kindness, leverage, danger, insult, reward, or shared need can move a creature out of indifference and into a more favorable or more hostile state.
